name: Sustained Power Flow (60-min)
description: 60-minute power vinyasa with longer holds and a dedicated drill block. Five-block structure: Integration → Sun A & B → Core/Drills → Standing Peak → Cool Down → Savasana. Higher coaching demand than basic power vinyasa.

music_pedagogy.beat: Sustained holds need steady, sustained rhythmic support — not just build-and-drop patterns.
music_pedagogy.voice: More cueing per minute than basic power flow (alignment work, drill counts). Vocal density of tracks should be lowest during the drill block.
music_pedagogy.count: 8-count countdowns are common in drills (e.g. boat-pose pulses, bicycle twists).

phases.name: Integration
phases.notes: Meditative, atmospheric. Integrating onto the mat.

phases.name: Sun A & B (Build)
phases.notes: Increasing energy and tempo for breath-to-movement flows.

phases.name: Standing Series
phases.notes: Warriors, balances, peak posture. Sustained intensity.

phases.name: Cool Down
phases.notes: Floor work, hip openers, forward folds.

phases.name: Savasana
phases.notes: Very low energy or ambient. Supports 2+ minutes of silence in savasana — a track may end before silence falls.

theme_anchor.rationale: Lyrics land at the drill-block transition or just after — peak emotional + physical intensity.

content_filter: Filter explicit lyrics by default for studio-friendliness.
